{{CargoRelic
|name=Huayin Shadow Puppet
|class_id=20545
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Huayin Shadow Puppet is known for its delicate carving techniques and lifelike images, and is widely beloved by shadow puppet troupes and communities from various regions.
|fame=18
|art=16
|fth=12
|civ=32
|tech=12
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Per 3 Incense used, Snail RUSH +1<br>Incense Used: 150/150
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Per 3 Incense used, Snail RUSH +2<br>Incense Used: 150/150
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 3 Incense used, Snail RUSH +3<br>Incense Used: 150/150
|ss4=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 3 Incense used, Snail RUSH +3<br>Incense Used: 150/150
|ss7=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 3 Incense used, Snail RUSH +3<br>Incense Used: 150/150<br> (Awakened)
}}
